sections.paragraph:
ψευδάδελφος, ου, ὁ one who pretends to be a fellow-believer, but whose claim is belied by conduct toward fellow-believers, false brother, false member. Paul applies the term to certain opponents 2 Cor 11:26; Gal 2:4. Of such as masquerade in allegiance to the Lord and mislead unsophisticated members w. wrong beliefs Pol 6:3.—TW.

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1096
